name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Canalsatld
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a CanalSatLD infrared remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The address (or sub-device) to send to, see dumper output for more details. Defaults to `0`.

config_entries.label: Device
config_entries.description: The device to send to, see dumper output for more details.
